about me

Who I Am

I'm Arshad Rahmani, a Systems Engineer at Infosys and an aspiring Java AI Backend Developer currently pursuing my MCA from IIIT Ranchi (2025–2027).

My expertise lies in building scalable backend systems using Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, JPA/Hibernate, and Microservices. Alongside backend development, I am actively expanding into AI Engineering by learning LangChain4j, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Vector Databases, and LLM-powered applications.

At Infosys, I work on enterprise-grade technologies and software engineering practices while continuously strengthening my problem-solving skills through Data Structures & Algorithms. I have solved 250+ LeetCode problems and regularly study system design, low-level design, and distributed systems.

My goal is to become a Java AI Backend Engineer capable of designing high-performance microservices, AI-powered platforms, and production-ready backend architectures for modern product companies.

Currently focused on:

  • Java & Spring Boot
  • Microservices Architecture
  • PostgreSQL & Redis
  • Kafka & Event-Driven Systems
  • LangChain4j & RAG Pipelines
  • System Design & DSA

"I believe great software is built through clean architecture, scalable design, and continuous learning."

system design

Architecture I Build

This is the kind of system I design and implement — a production-grade microservices stack with AI capabilities baked in from day one.

📱Client sends request via HTTPS
↓
🔐API Gateway validates JWT token
↓
🍃Spring Boot service processes business logic
↓
⚡Kafka handles async event streaming
↓
🤖AI service uses RAG + LangChain4j for intelligence
↓
🗄️PostgreSQL persists data, Redis caches responses

Built a full-featured student management platform using Core Java, JDBC, and MySQL. Implemented student registration, record management, search, update, and reporting modules using layered architecture and optimized SQL queries. Followed clean coding practices and MVC design principles.
